root_cause: Service 'search' is missing EndpointSlice objects needed for backend discovery
evidence: Service 'search' is selector-based but no EndpointSlice objects with label kubernetes.io/service-name=search were found
Observed 3 recent failure signal(s) referencing Service 'search' within the last 20 minutes
Legacy Endpoints for Service 'search' still contain ready backend address(es): 10.244.1.37, 10.244.2.12
Recent events also mention EndpointSlice sync or controller failure for the Service
Workload configuration explicitly references the affected Service

causes.message: Selector-based Service 'search' should have controller-managed EndpointSlices
No EndpointSlice objects are linked to Service 'search'
Service backend routing metadata is incomplete even though the Service exists

service:search: No matching EndpointSlice objects found for the Service
Legacy Endpoints still list ready backend addresses
pod:catalog-api-74cc9bb66b-wqf8m: Error: failed to connect to http://search.default.svc.cluster.local:8080/query: dial tcp 10.96.41.22:8080: i/o timeout

likely_causes: The EndpointSlice controller is unhealthy or cannot reconcile the Service
Admission, RBAC, or API errors prevented EndpointSlice creation or update
Service discovery objects drifted and Endpoints were populated without corresponding EndpointSlices
suggested_checks: Inspect kube-controller-manager and EndpointSlice controller health
